title: selaginella breynii
intro: Selaginella breynii, also known as the spikemoss or rattlesnake plant, is a type of ancient, non-vascular, and epiphytic plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions, and providing antioxidant protection. Selaginella breynii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also dried and used in traditional Chinese medicine as a powder or in combination with other herbs.
